Super speciality Experts What We Treat

Our Dental Services

Comprehensive care across many specialisations — all under one trusted name.

Implant Dentistry

Dental Implants

Permanent tooth replacement for single, multiple, and full arch missing teeth with careful planning and surgical precision.

Explore Treatment
Orthodontics

Clear Aligners & Braces

Straighten crowded teeth, bite issues, and smile alignment with removable aligners or fixed appliances.

Explore Treatment
Smile Design

Cosmetic Dentistry

Smile designing, whitening, veneers, tooth contouring, and gum aesthetic corrections for confident smiles.

Explore Treatment

Who We Are

Personalised Treatment,
Exceptional Care

DentiQ is Erode's trusted local Laser Dental Clinic, pioneering comfortable dentistry and welcoming care with a dedicated team of specialists.

Our clinical team brings together modern dental technology, sterile protocols, and patient-first communication for everything from routine care to advanced implants, smile design, root canals, and child dentistry.

  • Laser dental care with a comfort-first treatment approach
  • 99% Client Satisfaction Rate
  • Advanced sterilization and digital dental technology
  • Erode, Palayapalayam · 4.9 Google Rating
Book Consultation
Your Treatment Need?

Which dental concern can we Resolve for you?

Click on a concern to learn more about our superspeciality solutions.

Missing Teeth

Permanent replacement with implant dentistry.

Crooked Teeth

Straighten teeth with aligners or braces.

Tooth Pain

Root canal care for painful decayed teeth.

Bleeding Gums

Gum treatment, cleaning, and laser care.

Discolored Teeth

Whitening and smile-design treatments.

Broken Teeth

Crowns, bridges, and full-mouth restoration.

Black Cavities

Decay removal and tooth-colored fillings.

Unpleasant Smile?

Full smile transformation and veneers.
Smile Album

Our Practice Gallery

Witness the life-changing results our superspecialists achieve every single day.

Porcelain Veneers

Full Smile Makeover

Achieved perfectly straight, natural-looking white teeth in just 2 visits.

Invisalign

Invisible Alignment

Fixed severe crowding and bite alignment without unsightly metal braces.

Dental Implants

Implant Restoration

Restored full functionality and appearance after multiple tooth loss.

Practice Gallery

5-Star Clinic Environment

Experience world-class hospitality and technology in the heart of Erode.

Explore All Results
What Sets Us Apart

Why Choose Dentiq

We combine advanced technology with personalized care to deliver the best dental experience possible. Every patient receives a custom, evidence-based care plan tailored to their needs.

Top-Rated Orofacial Pain Centre

India's leading specialist for TMJ, migraine, and orofacial disorders.

Advanced Technology

State-of-the-art 3D X-ray, laser dentistry, and digital smile design.

International Patients Welcome

Serving patients from across India and abroad with world-class comfort.

Satisfaction Rate

Patient Stories

What Our Patients Say

250+ verified Google reviews  ·  4.9 average rating

"Initially I came here with TMJ issue for past 2 years. I visited other dentists but those treatments did not give me proper cure but now I am completely cured. Trust me — visit Dr. Jane and she will thoroughly analyse the issue and give you proper treatment."

H
Harsha Baskaran Chennai

"I had severe jaw pain and facial pains for more than 5 years. I visited many specialists — ENT, ortho, neurologist. Came to know about Dr. Jane from Instagram. After 4 weeks of treatment I am totally pain free. I have never been this happy."

D
Deepikask Chennai

"Doctor John is so experienced that he gave me the best solution without surgery. He was gentle and attentive. Post removal they called the next morning to check if everything was okay. None of the dental centres do this."

N
Nadir Farhan Chennai

"With my recent root canal treatment, each member from the reception to dental assistant played an integral role in making my experience comfortable and smooth. Thank you all."

S
Sunilkumar Balan Chennai

"Totally advanced X-ray technology. Laser root canal with absolutely no pain. Appointment fixed with our convenience. Overall had a great experience and will recommend this clinic."

P
Pavithra Balachandran Chennai

"From past 5 years I was suffering with facial pains and headaches. After 5 weeks of treatment I am totally pain free. Thanks to Dr Jane mam. They treat patients very kindly."

R
Rizwana Amanulla Chennai
